Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x1F57 "ODYSSEY-1000-1F57" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $1000 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Odyssey.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
This game has a BASIC loading screen loaded at $0801. Therefore an init routine has been added at $1000 which: 1. Sets up the correct VICII settings and necessary BASIC pointers. 2. Executes the RUN command to display the loading screen.
Note: Line 205 in the BASIC instructions program was changed from SYS 8000 to SYS 8023 to skip the loading of the game from tape as it's already in memory.
